thesis: Stripe expressed preliminary acquisition interest in February 2026, but PayPal is not actively seeking a sale, leaving a deal possible but unlikely near-term.
method: Probability estimated from credibility of Bloomberg/CNBC reports, Semafor's counter-signal that PayPal isn't seeking a sale, and absence of formal deal announcement as of March 18.

evidence.signal: Bloomberg reported Stripe is considering acquiring all or parts of PayPal; PYPL stock surged ~7%
Semafor reported PayPal may not be actively seeking a sale, dampening deal speculation
PayPal remains independent as of March 18; Airwallex summary confirms no deal closed and interest was only preliminary
